skills.name: fs2
skills.description: Guides Scala FS2 functional stream processing — lazy, resource-safe, concurrent streaming built on Cats Effect. Use when building pipelines that read, transform, merge, or sink data with backpressure.

skills.name: circe
skills.description: Scala JSON processing with Circe — parsing, encoding/decoding, cursor traversal, codec derivation (auto, semi-auto, custom), ADT handling, optics, and configuration. Use when working with JSON in Scala projects using the Circe library.
